stage: Stage 2: Test Design And RED Evidence
summary: Focused tests define the non-blocking review finding routing contract before production implementation. They fail because land-check still accepts only Local Qwen pass or bootstrap_gap evidence and does not enforce durable routing for non_blocking findings.
test_command: node --test --test-name-pattern "non-blocking Local Qwen findings|blocker Local Qwen findings" test/landing-gates.test.mjs
observed_output: land-check accepts non-blocking Local Qwen findings with durable routing failed: safe-to-land requires local Qwen pass or explicit bootstrap_gap evidence

land-check blocks non-blocking Local Qwen findings without durable routing failed: expected non-blocking review findings require durable follow-up routing, received safe-to-land requires local Qwen pass or explicit bootstrap_gap evidence

land-check keeps blocker Local Qwen findings blocked even with routing failed: expected Local Qwen reviewer verdict blocks landing: blocker, received safe-to-land requires local Qwen pass or explicit bootstrap_gap evidence

acceptance_criteria_mapping.criterion: The chore brief exists and links to BANDIT-GAP-NONBLOCKING-REVIEW-FINDING-ROUTING.
acceptance_criteria_mapping.evidence: docs/work/BANDIT-023/brief.md exists and .bandit/bootstrap-gaps.json links BANDIT-GAP-NONBLOCKING-REVIEW-FINDING-ROUTING to BANDIT-023.

acceptance_criteria_mapping.criterion: The future implementation or policy artifact names Non-Blocking Review Finding as the canonical term.
acceptance_criteria_mapping.evidence: CONTEXT.md already defines Non-Blocking Review Finding; RED tests use non_blocking Local Qwen evidence as the executable policy case.

acceptance_criteria_mapping.criterion: Stage 4 evidence can record non_blocking reviewer findings with PM disposition and durable follow-up routing without forcing another review solely because the disposition artifact was written.
acceptance_criteria_mapping.evidence: The routed non_blocking test expects land-check to return safe-to-land when review evidence records pm_disposition_rationale and non_blocking_findings_routing.

acceptance_criteria_mapping.criterion: Landing remains blocked when PM disposition or follow-up routing is missing.
acceptance_criteria_mapping.evidence: The unrouted non_blocking test expects land-check to fail with a durable follow-up routing error instead of accepting a bare rationale.

acceptance_criteria_mapping.criterion: Landing remains blocked when findings are blocker-level.
acceptance_criteria_mapping.evidence: The blocker Local Qwen test expects land-check to preserve fail-closed blocker behavior even if a follow-up route is present.

acceptance_criteria_mapping.criterion: BANDIT-022 follow-up candidates are linked to the new routing contract or explicitly dispositioned.
acceptance_criteria_mapping.evidence: The routed test references docs/work/BANDIT-022/follow-up-chores.md as the durable follow-up source example.

acceptance_criteria_mapping.criterion: No cockpit, broader coordination primitive, automatic merge/push/deploy, or product feature work is introduced.
acceptance_criteria_mapping.evidence: The focused tests touch only Stage 4 and Stage 5 land-check evidence interpretation.

next_action: Implement the non-blocking review finding routing contract in review evidence parsing and land-check readiness. Accept non_blocking review findings only with concrete PM disposition and durable routing, keep blocker findings fail-closed, and do not broaden into cockpit, Phase 6 coordination, automatic merge/push/deploy, or product feature work.
